mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_OWNED_PLAYERS ( OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ, USER_ID, PLAYER_SEQ, CURRENT_ATTACK, CURRENT_DEFENSE, CURRENT_HP, CURRENT_HARASS, CURRENT_SPEED, ACQUIRED_AT, CURRENT_RARITY, ACQUIRED_FROM_PACK_SEQ, CONDITION, WIN_STREAK ) VALUES ( SEQ_OWNED_PLAYERS.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{playerSeq}, #{currentAttack}, #{currentDefense}, #{currentHp}, #{currentHarass}, #{currentSpeed}, SYSDATE, #{currentRarity}, #{acquiredFromPackSeq}, 'NORMAL', 0 )
mapper.select:
SELECT op.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ, op.USER_ID, op.PLAYER_SEQ, op.CURRENT_ATTACK, op.CURRENT_DEFENSE, op.CURRENT_HP, op.CURRENT_HARASS, op.CURRENT_SPEED, op.ACQUIRED_AT, op.CURRENT_RARITY, op.CONDITION AS condition, op.WIN_STREAK AS winStreak, op.ENHANCE_LEVEL AS enhanceLevel, op.ENHANCE_ATTACK AS enhanceAttack, op.ENHANCE_DEFENSE AS enhanceDefense, op.ENHANCE_HP AS enhanceHp, op.ENHANCE_HARASS AS enhanceHarass, op.ENHANCE_SPEED AS enhanceSpeed, p.PLAYER_NAME, p.RACE, p.RARITY AS "baseRarity", p.PLAYER_IMG_URL, p.PLAYER_COST, pack.PACK_NAME,
NVL(r.wins, 0) AS wins, NVL(r.losses, 0) AS losses, CASE WHEN (NVL(r.wins, 0) + NVL(r.losses, 0)) > 0 THEN ROUND(NVL(r.wins, 0) * 100.0 / (NVL(r.wins, 0) + NVL(r.losses, 0)), 1) ELSE 0 END AS winRate FROM TBL_OWNED_PLAYERS op JOIN TBL_PLAYERS p ON op.PLAYER_SEQ = p.PLAYER_SEQ LEFT JOIN TBL_PACKS pack ON op.ACQUIRED_FROM_PACK_SEQ = pack.PACK_SEQ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ, SUM(CASE WHEN IS_WIN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS wins, SUM(CASE WHEN IS_WIN = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS losses FROM TBL_MATCH_RECORDS GROUP BY OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ ) r ON op.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ = r.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ WHERE op.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY op.CURRENT_ATTACK + op.CURRENT_DEFENSE + op.CURRENT_HP + op.CURRENT_HARASS DESC

SELECT op.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ, op.USER_ID, op.PLAYER_SEQ, op.CURRENT_ATTACK, op.CURRENT_DEFENSE, op.CURRENT_HP, op.CURRENT_HARASS, op.CURRENT_SPEED, op.ACQUIRED_AT, op.CURRENT_RARITY, op.CONDITION AS condition, op.WIN_STREAK AS winStreak, op.ENHANCE_LEVEL AS enhanceLevel, op.ENHANCE_ATTACK AS enhanceAttack, op.ENHANCE_DEFENSE AS enhanceDefense, op.ENHANCE_HP AS enhanceHp, op.ENHANCE_HARASS AS enhanceHarass, op.ENHANCE_SPEED AS enhanceSpeed,
p.PLAYER_NAME, p.RACE, p.RARITY AS "baseRarity", p.PLAYER_IMG_URL, p.PLAYER_COST,
pack.PACK_NAME
FROM TBL_OWNED_PLAYERS op JOIN TBL_PLAYERS p ON op.PLAYER_SEQ = p.PLAYER_SEQ LEFT JOIN TBL_PACKS pack ON op.ACQUIRED_FROM_PACK_SEQ = pack.PACK_SEQ WHERE op.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ = #{ownedPlayerSeq}

SELECT OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ, USER_ID, PLAYER_SEQ, CURRENT_ATTACK, CURRENT_DEFENSE, CURRENT_HP, CURRENT_HARASS, CURRENT_SPEED, ACQUIRED_AT, CURRENT_RARITY, ACQUIRED_FROM_PACK_SEQ, CONDITION AS condition, WIN_STREAK AS winStreak, ENHANCE_LEVEL AS enhanceLevel, ENHANCE_ATTACK AS enhanceAttack, ENHANCE_DEFENSE AS enhanceDefense, ENHANCE_HP AS enhanceHp, ENHANCE_HARASS AS enhanceHarass, ENHANCE_SPEED AS enhanceSpeed, ENHANCE_STREAK AS enhanceStreak FROM TBL_OWNED_PLAYERS WHERE OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ = #{ownedPlayerSeq}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_OWNED_PLAYERS SET ENHANCE_LEVEL = #{enhanceLevel}, ENHANCE_ATTACK = #{enhanceAttack}, ENHANCE_DEFENSE = #{enhanceDefense}, ENHANCE_HP = #{enhanceHp}, ENHANCE_HARASS = #{enhanceHarass}, ENHANCE_SPEED = #{enhanceSpeed} WHERE OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ = #{ownedPlayerSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ, USER_ID, PLAYER_SEQ, CURRENT_ATTACK, CURRENT_DEFENSE, CURRENT_HP, CURRENT_HARASS, CURRENT_SPEED, ACQUIRED_AT, CURRENT_RARITY, ACQUIRED_FROM_PACK_SEQ, CONDITION AS condition, WIN_STREAK AS winStreak, ENHANCE_LEVEL AS enhanceLevel, ENHANCE_ATTACK AS enhanceAttack, ENHANCE_DEFENSE AS enhanceDefense, ENHANCE_HP AS enhanceHp, ENHANCE_HARASS AS enhanceHarass, ENHANCE_SPEED AS enhanceSpeed FROM TBL_OWNED_PLAYERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND PLAYER_SEQ = #{playerSeq} AND ACQUIRED_FROM_PACK_SEQ = #{acquiredFromPackSeq} AND OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ != #{ownedPlayerSeq} ORDER BY OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_OWNED_PLAYERS SET CURRENT_ATTACK = #{currentAttack}, CURRENT_DEFENSE = #{currentDefense}, CURRENT_HP = #{currentHp}, CURRENT_HARASS = #{currentHarass}, CURRENT_SPEED = #{currentSpeed} WHERE OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ = #{ownedPlayerSeq}
